home.title: PlogKit
home.tagline: Photos, words, and layouts ready to post.
home.description: Choose up to nine photos. Everything stays on this device.
home.resumeDescription: Your current session is saved on this device.
home.importPartial: Some photos could not be imported. The completed photos are ready.
home.importFailed: We couldn't prepare those photos. Try choosing them again.
home.recoveryFailed: The previous session was damaged. We kept a backup and opened a new session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.retainBasicDescription: New editing sessions keep the capture date and device details by default. You can override this before export.
settings.privacyNotice: GPS location is always removed. Settings stay on this device.

export.title: Export
export.retainUnavailable: Keeping photo details is not available for this export policy.
export.sRGBNotice: Exports are SDR/sRGB. GPS is always removed.

policyErrors.presetUnavailable: This preset is no longer available. Choose another preset to export.
policyErrors.formatNotAllowed: This preset does not allow the selected format. Choose another format or preset.
policyErrors.metadataNotAllowed: This preset and format cannot keep photo details. Remove photo details or choose another option.
policyErrors.formatUnsupported: This device cannot create the selected format. Choose another format or preset.
policyErrors.metadataUnsupported: This device cannot keep photo details for the selected format.
policyErrors.dynamicRangeUnsupported: This device cannot create the dynamic range required by this preset.
policyErrors.dynamicPhotoUnsupported: This device cannot create the dynamic photo output required by this preset.
policyErrors.precompressionUnsupported: This device cannot apply the upload preparation required by this preset.
policyErrors.postProcessUnsupported: This device cannot apply the finishing required by this preset.

export.failure: We couldn't save the export. Your editing session is unchanged.
export.reduced: Reduced to {{width}} × {{height}} to stay within export limits.
